ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_capture_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that captured the data */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was captured */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, video) */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the captured data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_capture_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_capture_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES motion_capture_sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_capture_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the robot (e.g., robotic arm, humanoid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robot */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robot */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_capture_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, accelerometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_capture_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the visualization belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "visualization_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_capture_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_robots" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the robot in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sensors" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sensor in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_capture_data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was captured */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint (e.g., HeadPitch, LAnkleRoll) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the joint angle or position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "timestamp", "joint_name")
)
